description: A full list or digest of uncovered denominators and timing logs is currently not available in the data provided. To address this, the experiment must output a reproducible file (or its compressed hash) enumerating uncovered denominators and a trace log of run times per N value, so that others can verify the GPU findings and exact coverage.
